content.scenarioHint: 顾客在超市看到一款洗发水，想确认是否有折扣或赠品活动
content.speakerText: Is there any promotion on this shampoo right now?
content.speakerTextCn: 这款洗发水现在有促销活动吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, it's buy one get one free this week.
We have a 20% discount if you buy two or more.
Not right now, but there's a free sample you can take at the end of the aisle.
You can get a bonus travel-sized bottle when you scan the QR code on the shelf.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了促销或赠品信息
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯，不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 promotion, discount, free, bonus 等相关关键词

content.speakerText: Do you have any ongoing promotions this week?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周有什么持续促销活动吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, we have a weekly sale on dairy products — 20% off all cheese and yogurt.
There's a flash sale on fruits and vegetables every Friday.
We don't have fixed promotions, but signing up for our app gives you exclusive weekly deals.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明是否有促销及具体内容
语言准确性：使用恰当时态（现在进行时、一般现在时）和促销术语
表达自然度：包含场景关键词如 'weekly sale', 'flash sale', 'exclusive deals', 'signing up'
